Coruscant first appeared on-screen in Star Wars: Episode VI as the Imperial capital world.
The sound of a TIE fighter combines an elephant call with a car driving on wet pavement.
Ewoks were inspired partly by the filmmaker's dog as a visual reference.
Darth Vader's breathing became one of the most recognizable sound motifs in cinema.
The opening crawl style was inspired by 1930s and 1940s adventure serials.
BB-8 was built as a practical prop before extensive digital use.
The phrase 'I have a bad feeling about this' appears across multiple Star Wars films.
Mandalore is known for beskar, a rare metal resistant to lightsabers.
